Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class StrategyNodeIf

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.StrategyNodeBase
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.StrategyNodeUnionBase
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.StrategyNodeIf
public class StrategyNodeIf extends StrategyNodeUnionBase

Java class for StrategyNodeIf complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="StrategyNodeIf">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}StrategyNodeUnionBase">
       <sequence>
         <element name="childNodeExpression" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}IfExpression" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="onlyFirstMatch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getChildNodeExpression

      public List<IfExpression> getChildNodeExpression()
      Gets the value of the childNodeExpression property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the childNodeExpression property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getChildNodeExpression().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list IfExpression

      Returns:
      The value of the childNodeExpression property.

    • isOnlyFirstMatch

      public Boolean isOnlyFirstMatch()
      Gets the value of the onlyFirstMatch property.
      Returns:
      possible object is Boolean

    • setOnlyFirstMatch

      public void setOnlyFirstMatch(Boolean value)
      Sets the value of the onlyFirstMatch property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is Boolean
